violations.text: Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
Ham, ham broth, and beans were marked with dates exceeding 7 days. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023

Establishment is using time as a public health control without approval, documentation, or correct procedures. Forms to request approval provided during inspection. English Time as a Public Health Control Log New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023

Pork pasteles packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023

Utensils observed stored on unclean surfaces (shelf in front service area, and on edges of top of food prep unit) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the curtains between the kitchen and front service area have an accumulation of food residue and debris. The fans in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, leaves, and debris. The chest freezer has an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2023
